DP.552.0000:
Hello!
I’m with Jubilife TV!\f
May I hit you up for a quick
interview?
DP.552.0001:
Oh, that’s too bad.
I hope you can oblige another time!
DP.552.0002:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts
with us.\f
We’ll be featuring this interview in
an upcoming TV program.\f
Please do tune in and see how you
look on TV!
DP.552.0004:
Thank you very much!
Let’s not waste any time...\f
So, may I hear about your Battle
Tower challenge?\f
Can you tell me what you’re feeling
now?\f
DP.552.0006:
Thank you very much!
Let’s not waste any time...\f
Your [0100,0000] is quite appealing,
isn’t it?\f
May I have your comment on your
[0100,0000]?\f
DP.552.0008:
Thank you very much!
Let’s not waste any time...\f

use the most?\f
